diff: The maximum ratio of loan amount to collateral value permitted when a new loan is issued. Additionally, when a margin call is triggered, the borrower must return the position to an LTV ratio equal or less than the Initial LTV. Borrowers may only withdraw collateral from their position if their position LTV remains below the Initial LTV threshold after the withdrawal.

diff: The maximum ratio of loan amount to collateral value permitted when a new loan is issued. Additionally, when a margin call is triggered, the borrower must return the position to an LTV ratio equal or less than the Initial LTV. Borrowers may only withdraw collateral from their position if their position LTV remains below the Initial LTV threshold after the withdrawal.
